articles.title: Zimbabwe opposition groups fight against proposed constitutional change
articles.description: The proposed amendments would extend the presidential term from five to seven years and replace direct presidential elections with a vote by lawmakers.

articles.title: Beijing tells Chinese firms to strengthen Zimbabwe risk prevention after mineral export ban
articles.description: China's government on Thursday told Chinese businesses operating in Zimbabwe to "strenghthen risk prevention and compliance awareness" after the country suspended ​exports of raw minerals and lithium concentrates.

more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.
